public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as itinerary keeper.
manner: Thinks in movement, timing, and obstacle management, treating delay as a concrete threat. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a itinerary keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of itinerary keeper in and around Mimolot Lecture Caravan, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mimolot Lecture Caravan workable through the obligations of itinerary keeper while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep timing, safety, and route credibility aligned when any disruption threatens all three. Around Mimolot Lecture Caravan, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of itinerary keeper visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vivan Duststep will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.
Vivan Duststep needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Mimolot Lecture Caravan.
